_meta.artifact: Tidy Tails production pre-migration security advisor snapshot
_meta.purpose: Ship 2.2b rehearsal — baseline of every Supabase security-advisor lint BEFORE the groomer_id RLS-hardening migration. After the migration is rehearsed, re-run get_advisors and diff against this file: the 13 rls_policy_always_true WARNs should shrink, and the security_definer_view ERROR should ideally clear. Pre-existing lints unrelated to RLS (auth_leaked_password_protection, public_bucket_allows_listing) are expected to persist and are out of Ship 2.2b scope.
notes: 1 ERROR: security_definer_view on public.client_overview (the view runs with the owner's privileges, bypassing the caller's RLS).

13 rls_policy_always_true WARNs: one per INSERT and UPDATE policy across the 6 core tables plus the sam_review_responses INSERT policy — SELECT policies are intentionally excluded by the linter, so these 13 ≠ the 21-policy total in the policy snapshot.
rls_auto_enable() is flagged twice (anon + authenticated) as a publicly executable SECURITY DEFINER function via /rest/v1/rpc/rls_auto_enable.

auth_leaked_password_protection and public_bucket_allows_listing (sam-review storage bucket) are NOT caused by Ship 2.2b and are not in its remediation scope — recorded here only so the post-migration advisor diff is clean.
Backticks in `detail`/`description` strings are normalized to plain backticks; lint `name`, `level`, `metadata`, `cache_key`, and `remediation` are reproduced verbatim.

lints.name: security_definer_view
lints.title: Security Definer View
lints.description: Detects views defined with the SECURITY DEFINER property. These views enforce Postgres permissions and row level security policies (RLS) of the view creator, rather than that of the querying user
lints.detail: View `public.client_overview` is defined with the SECURITY DEFINER property

lints.name: function_search_path_mutable
lints.title: Function Search Path Mutable
lints.description: Detects functions where the search_path parameter is not set.
lints.detail: Function `public.update_updated_at_column` has a role mutable search_path

lints.name: rls_policy_always_true
lints.title: RLS Policy Always True
lints.description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like `USING (true)` or `WITH CHECK (true)` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with `USING (true)` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
lints.detail: Table `public.appointments` has an RLS policy `Authenticated can insert appointments` for `INSERT` that allows unrestricted access (WITH CHECK clause is always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security.

lints.name: rls_policy_always_true
lints.title: RLS Policy Always True
lints.description: Detects RLS policies that use overly permissive expressions like `USING (true)` or `WITH CHECK (true)` for UPDATE, DELETE, or INSERT operations. SELECT policies with `USING (true)` are intentionally excluded as this pattern is often used deliberately for public read access.
lints.detail: Table `public.appointments` has an RLS policy `Authenticated can update appointments` for `UPDATE` that allows unrestricted access (both USING and WITH CHECK are always true). This effectively bypasses row-level security.

lints.name: public_bucket_allows_listing
lints.title: Public Bucket Allows Listing
lints.description: Detects public storage buckets with a broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects`, which allows clients to list all files in the bucket.
lints.detail: Public bucket `sam-review` has 1 broad SELECT policy on `storage.objects` (sam_review_public_read), allowing clients to list all files. Public buckets don't need this for object URL access and it may expose more data than intended.

lints.name: anon_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Public Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
lints.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable without signing in. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if it is not meant to be public.
lints.detail: Function `public.rls_auto_enable()` can be executed by the `anon` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/rls_auto_enable`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

lints.name: authenticated_security_definer_function_executable
lints.title: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
lints.description: Detects `SECURITY DEFINER` functions that are callable by signed-in users. Revoke `EXECUTE`, switch the function to `SECURITY INVOKER`, or move it out of your exposed API schema if signed-in users should not call it.
lints.detail: Function `public.rls_auto_enable()` can be executed by the `authenticated` role as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function via `/rest/v1/rpc/rls_auto_enable`. Revoke `EXECUTE` or switch it to `SECURITY INVOKER` if that is not intentional.

lints.name: auth_leaked_password_protection
lints.title: Leaked Password Protection Disabled
lints.description: Leaked password protection is currently disabled.
lints.detail: Supabase Auth prevents the use of compromised passwords by checking against HaveIBeenPwned.org. Enable this feature to enhance security.
